    DashboardPanel
    AccountsActivityPanel displays detailed activity for a selected account.
    DocumentsPanel
     
    DonationsPanel
     
    DonorsPanel
    DonorsPanel displays a list of donors along with their donation data.
    DonorsPanel.Donor
    Donor represents a donor with an ID, name, total donation amount, and last donation date.
    DonorsPanel.DonorService
    DonorService defines the API for retrieving donor data.
    FundsPanel
     
    GenerateReportPanel
     
    GrantsPanel
    GrantsPanel displays a list of grants along with their detailed information.
    GrantsPanel.Grant
    Donor-like model class representing a Grant.
    GrantsPanel.GrantsService
    GrantsService defines the API for retrieving grant data.
